ucs.title: [LLM] MuddyWater (Mango Sandstorm) RMM tool deployment via spear-phishing lure
ucs.description: Hunts MuddyWater's signature initial-access pattern: a phishing email links to a legitimate file-host (OneHub, Egnyte, OneDrive, Synchroservices) hosting an MSI/EXE installer for a commercial RMM (ScreenConnect/ConnectWise Control, Atera, RemoteUtilities, Syncro, SimpleHelp). The user clicks, msiexec installs the RMM, and within minutes a ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe / AteraAgent.exe / rutserv.exe beacons out — this exact chain is documented by Microsoft (Mango Sandstorm), Mandiant and Group-IB across 2022-2024 MuddyWater intrusions in the Middle East, US, and EU.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstClick max(_time) as lastClick from datamodel=Web where Web.url IN ("*onehub.com*","*egnyte.com*","*1drv.ms*","*onedrive.live.com*","*synchroservices.com*","*storage.googleapis.com*","*filetransfer.io*") by Web.user Web.src Web.dest Web.url
| `drop_dm_object_name(Web)`
| join type=inner user [
  | tstats `summariesonly` count values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_name) as child_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","AteraAgent.exe","AgentPackageSTRemote.exe","rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe","SyncroService.exe","Syncro.Service.exe","SimpleService.exe","SOSCC.exe","AnyDesk.exe","TeamViewer_Service.exe") OR (Processes.process_name="msiexec.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*ScreenConnect*","*Atera*","*RemoteUtilities*","*Syncro*","*SimpleHelp*"))) by Processes.user Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process _time
  | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
  | rename user as user dest as host
  | eval install_time=_time
]
| where install_time >= firstClick AND install_time <= (firstClick + 1800)
| eval delay_sec = install_time - firstClick
| table firstClick install_time delay_sec user host Web.url child_proc parent cmdline
| sort - install_time
ucs.kql:
// MuddyWater RMM-via-phish chain: file-share click -> RMM installer/agent within 30 min
let WindowSec = 1800;
let RmmAgents = dynamic([
  "screenconnect.clientservice.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe",
  "ateraagent.exe","agentpackagestremote.exe",
  "rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe",
  "syncroservice.exe","syncro.service.exe",
  "simpleservice.exe","remoteworksservice.exe",
  "anydesk.exe","teamviewer_service.exe","soscc.exe"
]);
let RmmKeywords = dynamic([
  "screenconnect","connectwisecontrol","atera","remoteutilities",
  "rutserv","syncro","simplehelp","anydesk","action1"
]);
let FileShareHosts = dynamic([
  "onehub.com","egnyte.com","1drv.ms","onedrive.live.com",
  "synchroservices.com","storage.googleapis.com","filetransfer.io",
  "send-anywhere.com","workupload.com","file.io"
]);
let Clicks = UrlClickEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("ClickAllowed","ClickedThrough")
    | where Url has_any (FileShareHosts)
    | project ClickTime = Timestamp, AccountUpn, Url, NetworkMessageId;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName in~ (RmmAgents))
   or (FileName =~ "msiexec.exe" and tolower(ProcessCommandLine) has_any (RmmKeywords))
   or (InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "msiexec.exe" and tolower(InitiatingProcessCommandLine) has_any (RmmKeywords))
| join kind=inner Clicks on $left.AccountUpn == $right.AccountUpn
| where Timestamp between (ClickTime .. ClickTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| extend DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', Timestamp, ClickTime)
| project ClickTime, InstallTime = Timestamp, DelaySec, DeviceName, AccountUpn,
          Url, RmmBinary = FileName, RmmCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentBinary = InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine, SHA256
| order by InstallTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// MuddyWater RMM-via-phish chain on Sentinel telemetry
let WindowSec = 1800;
let RmmAgents = dynamic([
  "screenconnect.clientservice.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe",
  "ateraagent.exe","agentpackagestremote.exe",
  "rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe",
  "syncroservice.exe","simpleservice.exe",
  "anydesk.exe","teamviewer_service.exe"
]);
let RmmKeywords = dynamic([
  "screenconnect","connectwisecontrol","atera","remoteutilities",
  "rutserv","syncro","simplehelp","anydesk","action1"
]);
let FileShareHosts = dynamic([
  "onehub.com","egnyte.com","1drv.ms","onedrive.live.com",
  "synchroservices.com","storage.googleapis.com","filetransfer.io"
]);
let Clicks = OfficeActivity
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"
    | extend Sender = tostring(Sender), Subject = tostring(Subject)
    | extend ClickTime = TimeGenerated
    | project ClickTime, UserId = tolower(UserId), Subject, Sender;
let Installs = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ChildLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where ChildLeaf in (RmmAgents)
       or (ChildLeaf == "msiexec.exe" and tolower(CommandLine) has_any (RmmKeywords))
    | extend UserId = tolower(strcat(SubjectUserName, "@"))
    | project InstallTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ChildLeaf, CommandLine,
              ParentProcessName, SubjectUserName;
Installs
| join kind=inner Clicks on $left.SubjectUserName == $right.UserId
| where InstallTime between (ClickTime .. ClickTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| extend DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', InstallTime, ClickTime)
| project ClickTime, InstallTime, DelaySec, Computer, Account, Sender, Subject,
          ChildLeaf, CommandLine, ParentProcessName
| order by InstallTime desc
ucs.rationale: MuddyWater is the most prolific known abuser of commercial RMMs as a primary implant — Microsoft's October 2023 Mango Sandstorm report, CISA AA22-055A (joint with FBI/CNMF/NCSC) and Group-IB's 2024 reports all explicitly call out the file-share-hosted RMM-installer phishing chain (Egnyte/OneHub/SynchroServices link → ScreenConnect/Atera/RemoteUtilities/SimpleHelp). The 30-min window from click → i

ucs.title: [LLM] MuddyWater (Static Kitten) PowerShell stager via maldoc → POWERSTATS / Small Sieve / MuddyC2Go
ucs.description: Catches MuddyWater's hallmark execution chain: an Office product (Word/Excel/Outlook) spawns powershell.exe / mshta.exe / cmd.exe that pulls a stager via curl/Invoke-WebRequest and writes a script under ProgramData or AppData — the canonical loader pattern for POWERSTATS, Small Sieve (TA450 .NET-based Telegram stealer), Mori, and the MuddyC2Go Go-based framework reported by Deep Instinct (Nov 2023) and Mandiant.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstSeen max(_time) as lastSeen values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_hash) as sha256 from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","curl.exe") by Processes.user Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| where match(cmdline, "(?i)(invoke-webrequest|iwr|invoke-restmethod|irm|downloadstring|downloadfile|curl\s+http|certutil\s+-urlcache|bitsadmin\s+/transfer|-enc(odedcommand)?|FromBase64String|hidden|bypass|nop)") OR match(cmdline, "(?i)(programdata|appdata\\\\(local|roaming))\\\\.{1,40}\.(ps1|vbs|hta|bat|exe|dll)")
| eval mw_score = if(match(cmdline,"(?i)programdata"),1,0) + if(match(cmdline,"(?i)-enc"),1,0) + if(match(cmdline,"(?i)downloadstring|iwr|invoke-restmethod"),1,0) + if(match(cmdline,"(?i)bypass|hidden"),1,0)
| where mw_score >= 2
| table firstSeen lastSeen user dest parent_process_name process_name cmdline sha256 mw_score
| sort - lastSeen
ucs.kql:
// MuddyWater POWERSTATS / Small Sieve / MuddyC2Go staged loader from Office
let OfficeParents = dynamic(["winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
let StagerChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","curl.exe"]);
let DownloadKeywords = dynamic([
  "invoke-webrequest","iwr ","invoke-restmethod","irm ",
  "downloadstring","downloadfile","webclient",
  "certutil -urlcache","bitsadmin /transfer",
  "frombase64string"
]);
let ObfFlags = dynamic(["-enc ","-encodedcommand","-ec ","-w hidden","-windowstyle hidden","-nop","-noprofile","-exec bypass","-executionpolicy bypass"]);
let StagingPaths = dynamic([@"\programdata\", @"\appdata\local\", @"\appdata\roaming\", @"\public\"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (OfficeParents)
| where FileName in~ (StagerChildren)
| extend Cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| extend HasDownload = Cmd has_any (DownloadKeywords)
| extend HasObf = Cmd has_any (ObfFlags)
| extend HasStaging = Cmd has_any (StagingPaths)
| extend MwScore = toint(HasDownload) + toint(HasObf) + toint(HasStaging)
| where MwScore >= 2
   or Cmd matches regex @"(?i)(programdata|appdata\\(local|roaming))\\[^\\\s]{1,40}\.(ps1|vbs|hta|bat|exe|dll)"
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FileName matches regex @"(?i)\.(ps1|vbs|hta|bat|js|exe|dll)$"
    | where FolderPath has_any (StagingPaths)
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DroppedFile = FileName, DroppedPath = FolderPath, DroppedSHA256 = SHA256
  ) on DeviceId
| where isempty(DropTime) or DropTime between (Timestamp .. Timestamp + 5m)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child = FileName, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          DroppedFile, DroppedPath, DroppedSHA256, MwScore
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// MuddyWater Office-spawned PowerShell loader (Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688)
let OfficeParents = dynamic(["winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
let StagerChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","curl.exe"]);
let DownloadKeywords = dynamic([
  "invoke-webrequest","iwr ","invoke-restmethod","irm ",
  "downloadstring","downloadfile","webclient",
  "certutil -urlcache","bitsadmin /transfer","frombase64string"
]);
let ObfFlags = dynamic(["-enc ","-encodedcommand","-ec ","-w hidden","-windowstyle hidden","-nop","-exec bypass","-executionpolicy bypass"]);
let StagingPaths = dynamic([@"\programdata\", @"\appdata\local\", @"\appdata\roaming\", @"\public\"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| extend ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in (OfficeParents)
| where ChildLeaf in (StagerChildren)
| extend Cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
| extend HasDownload = Cmd has_any (DownloadKeywords)
| extend HasObf = Cmd has_any (ObfFlags)
| extend HasStaging = Cmd has_any (StagingPaths)
| extend MwScore = toint(HasDownload) + toint(HasObf) + toint(HasStaging)
| where MwScore >= 2
   or Cmd matches regex @"(?i)(programdata|appdata\\(local|roaming))\\[^\\\s]{1,40}\.(ps1|vbs|hta|bat|exe|dll)"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentLeaf, ChildLeaf, CommandLine, MwScore, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: MuddyWater Office-Spawned Obfuscated PowerShell Loader
id: 8b1f3c2a-4d6e-4f1a-b2c3-9e7a4f8c1d22
status: experimental
description: Detects MuddyWater (G0069 / Mango Sandstorm / Static Kitten) POWERSTATS / Small Sieve / MuddyC2Go loader chain where an Office app spawns PowerShell/mshta/cmd with download + obfuscation + ProgramData/AppData staging.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0069/
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/ (Mango Sandstorm tracking)
  - https://www.deepinstinct.com/blog/muddyc2go-latest-c2-framework-used-by-iranian-apt-muddywater
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218.005
  - attack.t1137.001
  - attack.g0069
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\winword.exe'
      - '\excel.exe'
      - '\powerpnt.exe'
      - '\outlook.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
  download_kw:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'Invoke-WebRequest'
      - 'IWR '
      - 'Invoke-RestMethod'
      - 'IRM '
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'DownloadFile'
      - 'WebClient'
      - 'certutil -urlcache'
      - 'bitsadmin /transfer'
      - 'FromBase64String'
  obf_kw:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '-enc '
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - '-ec '
      - '-w hidden'
      - '-WindowStyle Hidden'
      - '-nop'
      - '-exec bypass'
      - 'ExecutionPolicy Bypass'
  staging_kw:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '\ProgramData\'
      - '\AppData\Local\'
      - '\AppData\Roaming\'
      - '\Public\'
  condition: parent and child and ( (download_kw and obf_kw) or (download_kw and staging_kw) or (obf_kw and staging_kw) )
fields:
  - ParentImage
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - User
  - Computer
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate macros from internal Office add-in deployment that fetch updates
  - SCCM / Intune scripted Office customisations
level: high
ucs.rationale: MuddyWater is one of the most consistent macro-document users of any APT — POWERSTATS (PowerShell only), Small Sieve (TA450, March 2022, Microsoft Threat Intelligence), Mori, MuddyC2Go (Deep Instinct, Nov 2023) and the SimpleHarm / SloppyShell loaders all start with this exact Office→PowerShell→ProgramData/AppData chain. The score-based combination of (Office parent + LOLBin child + download verb
